_note: Curated ROM->JS coverage map. Denominator = routine labels parsed from `files` (+ `extraRoutines` from shared files). Numerator = `status` (done|partial|out-of-scope; anything unlisted defaults to todo). Keep this honest: mark `done` only when the routine is genuinely reimplemented (documented divergences are still `done`). See docs/rom-coverage.md (generated).

outOfScope._note: Gameplay-only denominator. Hardware init, PSG/sound-driver internals, and copy-protection are excluded. The files below are MSX plumbing with no behavioural equivalent needed in the canvas port (sprite-attribute upload + flicker shuffle, HUD masking sprites, VDP/PSG init, region lock); they are not assigned to any component. Routine-level exclusions inside counted files use the per-routine "out-of-scope" status instead.

components.title: Guard (patrol, LOS, alert, chase, shoot, punch)
components.notes: Core patrol + the FULL alert state machine + global alarm + reinforcements + punch-KO are ported. The alert AI (guardalert.asm) does chase (commit-then-re-aim, ~3/4 stop-and-shoot), wait-after-shot, obstacle detour, AND the RED-ALERT stand-off (SetGuardWalkAway/GuardWalkAwayShot statuses 3/4 via ChkNearPlayer max(|dx|,|dy|)<0x30), the RED-ALERT double-shot on resume + faster 0x0A cadence (SetGuardRndCounter), the status-4 init beat (GuardWaitChkAlert) that triggers the alarm, ChkGuardWater/MoveAwayExit (turn 180 off a door/lorry/chasm exit tile), and the lorry-interior dedup (InitGuardAlert2/3 + ChkDismissGuard via the Guard1/2/3ExitedLorry flags). LOS is now EXACT (chkdiscover.asm): the up/left-include-level facing asymmetry, the |dx|<8 / guard-|dy|<6 / camera-|dy|<4 sight bands, ChkViewObstacles see-through railings, and the noise/touch discovery (ListenShotsChkTouch/ChkDiscoverPlayer2-6 — a touch or an exploding shot wakes sleeping guards + sentinels). Reinforcements use the card-based budget (SetAlertMode2-4 NumRespawnGuards = highest card + 3; room 216 none; rooms 187/154/88-92 budget 10 via SetRespawnTime) spent on kills (DecRespawnGuards), with ChkAlarmEnd holding a red/camera alarm across rooms until the budget is spent. Documented divergences (partial): patrol pauses at every waypoint instead of UpdateActorPath random stop-and-wait + GuardPatrolTurn look-turn; ChkGuardWater2 in-water sprite omitted; the distinct RED-alert music track and the buggy alert-icon +8/0xBF positioning are not reproduced.

components.title: Enemy bullet actors (aimed shot + axis bullets)
components.notes: InitShotToPlayer (ID_BULLET 0x3D: jetpacks, Hind D, lorry shooters, guard-switch) is ported as fireGuardBullet (hind-d change): the faithful quantized CalcShot2 aim at ShotSpeed 0x90 (QuadrantDegrees + the sin table, ported verbatim), player collision, the bullet sprite, and the pool cap; the Hind D compensates the torso-origin offset to fire from the actor's own XY like the ROM. Minor divergence: fireGuardBullet plays the shot SFX, which the ROM's InitShotToPlayer does not (SFX 5 belongs to InitBulletVert2). The InitBulletHor/InitBulletVert axis bullets (fixed ±5px/iteration along the axis toward screen centre + a random ±0x40 perpendicular jitter from the R register) are NOT implemented: their ROM spawners are the Shooter actor (rooms 88/90/91/206), the room-150 GuardSilencer pop-out shots, and Big Boss — the port substitutes aimed fireGuardBullet shots for Big Boss and approximates Shooter rooms with forced-alarm alert guards (undocumented divergences). InitBulletVert2's shared spawn tail (Moving=1, COLLISION_CFG=1, sprite 0x72, SFX 5) is effectively present via fireGuardBullet + updateBullets, hence partial.

components.title: Snake movement + tile collision
components.notes: 8-direction walk, speed (PlayerMovSpeed=2px/frame), and the shape-0 box collider are ported. Input is read from the browser keyboard rather than the PSG/keyboard-matrix routines (equivalent, hence partial). Player bullets are tracked under player-weapons. The enemy-bullet tile check (BulletLogic/BulletLogic2) is ported in updateBullets: railing tiles 0x6B/0x6E never stop a bullet, and a solid hit only removes it when the tile two rows down (the +0x40 probe) is also solid and non-railing; applied to the tile-checked dispatch classes (0x2F guard bullets, 0x3B shooter bullets) while 0x3A/0x3C/0x3D/0x3E fly through walls, matching the EnemyLogic dispatch table (fixed by the hind-d change's fireGuardBullet shadowing repair).

components.title: CommonLogic per-frame checks + bridge flag
components.notes: The CommonLogic check chain is reproduced across the play tick: ChkPlayerShots, ChkTouchEnemies (guards + lasers), ChkOnBridge (bridgeTick), ChkElectricFloor, ChkGasRooms, ChkDoors (incl. the punch-opened locks every frame), ChkTakeItems, then the capture trigger with the exact ROM constants (EquipBagTaken gate, Room 8, X 0xC0-0xD0 -> the capture scene). Dead gating is via gameState/enterDead rather than the GameMode compare; ordering is slightly rearranged but each check runs every play frame like the ROM. SetOnBridge's flag-plus-TOUCH_INFO behaviour is in bridgeTick. The file's includes (touchenemy/pitfall/etc.) are tracked under their own components.

components.title: Room traversal (transitions + entry placement)
components.notes: Edge transitions, door entry (PlayerInDoorDat copied verbatim, SetPlayerInDoor2-4 exact 8-bit-wrap centering), elevators (SetNextRoomElev shaft exits park the cabin at 0xD0/0x18 with player Y-4; SetElevatorPosY door entry at 0xD8/floor Y, cabin 0x70; SetElevatorCtrl mode 2 facing left), the roof jump and bridge falls (ChkParachute room 204 x2 / FreeFall lands dead, jumpId 1/2/3 from doors 0x5B/0x81/0x91), and the fixed yard landings (SetLandingPos2/DogsR/Lorries/DogsL values verbatim, playtest-Test-2 confirmed) are all ported in web/game.js. Remaining gaps: SetNextRoom's desert get-lost redirect (leaving room 103 without the compass loops back to 103) is unported; non-door edge entry uses ENTER_MARGIN 12 mirroring plus an invented nearest-open-spot scan instead of the EntryRoomXY constants (0xB8/0x12/0xF2/0x0C, no scan); SetLadderRoomEntry's ladder-walk entry (0xD8/0x9E, mode 6) exists but only the ?room=224 dev hook calls it — the real door 0x6B from Big Boss room 119 goes through generic enterDoor (type-6 row [0,0,0], normal control). PreviousRoom is not modeled as state but each consumer (elevator exit mode reset, parachute landing) is handled contextually.

components.title: Doors (open / enter / draw)
components.notes: The full ChkOpenDoor lock dispatch is ported: plain doors, keycards (ChkCard1-8), elevator doors (lock 1: type 5 up / type 6 right), the punch door (10), the lorry door (11), the desert/compass/Big-Boss event doors (12/13/14 via one-shot flags), the punchable prison walls (15: PunchWallDirs, PrisonWall1/2Life 0x28), and the lock-16 bomb/secret walls. The breakable/secret WALLS (render types 7-19, DrawBasemWall*/DrawWall) are drawn closed from their own wall-N.png sprites and made solid (closedWallSolid), then opened by a bomb/punch and wiped away (EraseBasemWall*), revealing the room art behind — RestoreSavedTiles' VRAM save/restore is replaced by the pre-rendered room PNG (documented). ChkEnterDoor is ported including the hidden doors 0x40/0x6C (never auto-entered), the IN-ROOM walls (dest === room; rooms 58/60/63/100/108 open a passage without a room reload — the 0x20 logic bit), and the MetalGear_KO door-0x62 lockout. Open/enter areas come from door-types.json (DoorOpenEnterDat verbatim). Divergences (partial): the per-wall erase WIPE is one shared directional approximation; ChkDoorLorry2 is a stand-in; SetDoorOpen's DoorOpenArray persistence is event-doors-only.

components.title: Elevators (ride, cabin, elevator guards)
components.notes: The full relieve ceremony is ported (elevReliefTick): the two posted guards (InitGuardElevat) look around (GuardRandomDir), leave after the post timer announcing "Relieve" (GuardElevIdle -> Walk/Leave), and a spawner (InitSpawnGuardElev/SpawnGuardElev) marches a fresh pair in from the right (InitGuardRelieve); a player in the corridor (PlayerY<0x3D, GuardElevSetAlert/Leave) sounds the alarm — guard 1 becomes a chasing alert guard, guard 2 flees right (GuardElevAlert/GuardElevFlees). Partial: the 0xF-iteration look-at-player delay before the transform is collapsed and DrawAlertSign's "!!" icon shows via the normal alert icon (SaveAlertIconBacknd/Draw16x16 are VDP page-copy plumbing, out of scope). The elevator RIDE (GameMode 6 / ElevatorRoomLogic) is a verbatim port — 1px cabin+player movement, the 0x38/0x78/0xB8 floor stops, the express-shaft hold-to-skip quirks, shaft-end chaining with 0xD0/0x18 parking, and held-dir-as-facing at a stop; the 12-sprite cabin is composed offline into elevator.png. Divergence: a shaft exit whose neighbour room isn't exported stops the cabin in place.

components.title: Player damage, life, death + life bar
components.notes: Life (rank-scaled MaxLife 24/32/40/48 over the 0x30 bar), damage with the 0x20-frame DamageDelayTimer window, the death sequence (SetDead + DeadLogic timer), the LIFE bar + CLASS stars, the weapon (icon + Render3Numbers ammo) and item HUD, and the red damage flash are ported (change: player-hud). The guard touch path is faithful (guard-touch-alert): ChkTouchEnemies/ChkTouchEnemy with the ROM shape-8 touch box, the stunned skip, TOUCH_INFO bit 7, TouchPlayer damage from any non-stunned guard; TouchPlayer's no-damage exemptions (prisoners/Ellen/Grey Fox/Madnar/fake Madnar) and per-actor ActorTouchDamage values are honoured across the actor branches. The former touch-branch gaps are now live actors: laser/laser-shot (lasers change), pitfall (ellen-pitfalls), bridge SetOnBridge flag (roof-traversal), scorpion poison via ChkScorpion's box (desert-scorpions; the damage SFX fires only on the poison transition — minor divergence). DrawCallTimer/DrawCallTimer2 are done (incoming-radio-call + intro-scene): bit-3 blink, menu erase, the mod-16 SFX 0x22 cadence, txtCALL as the exported call-sign.png; DrawDestrucTimer is done (endgame): the 3000-unit countdown's red digits own the CALL slot once armed, cigarettes add 2000. Gas rooms are done (ellen-pitfalls): the GAS_ROOMS set matches the 9 GasRooms bytes verbatim, 2 life per 0x10 frames without the mask (DecrementLife_C). ChkUsingArmor (the bullet-proof vest, item 1, halves incoming damage) is now done. ChkTouchEnemy2's land-mine self-destruct branch — room 9's ID_LAND_MINE enemy actors are not exported or built, so it's partial. InitPlayerVars/DeadLogic stay partial (init + continue flow not fully modeled).

components.title: Player control modes (dispatch + ladders + intro)
components.notes: Every PlayerControlMod the dispatch reaches is now ported: walk=0, punch=1, dead=3 (player-control-modes), elevator=2 (elevators change: ElevatorCtrl's ride-start check, walk-only horizontal control, the ChkLimitXElevator left clamp at 104 — the 243 right clamp stands in for the ROM's undefined X>=244 exit, documented), parachute=4 (roof-traversal: ParachuteLogic's 1px/iteration fall with the TickCounter-bit-4 ±1 sway, anim 3, the multi-screen NextParachuteRoom repeats and the SetLandingPos2 touchdown), air flow=5 (roof-traversal: AirFlowLogic's 3px/iteration push-up until Y<0x30 then walk, entered by the room-53 band unless the bomb blast suit is selected), the building-2 escape-ladder modes 6/7 (snake-ladders), and the INTRO scene mode 8 (intro-scene: the full 13-state scripted infiltration in room 121 with the call, the radio text-2 briefing, the fence-climb snaps, the BounceOffsets hop, and the landing checkpoint via restart). Shallow/deep water is RoomsWater-gated (snake-water); deep-water oxygen drain runs (oxygen tank not ownable yet — documented). Box is tracked separately. SetLadderRoomEntry is counted by the room-traversal component.

components.title: Player weapons (handgun + shots + selection)
components.notes: The FULL ARSENAL is ported (change: player-weapons-full): the ChkWeaponShot dispatch with its room/water/box gates; handgun + SMG (hold-autofire every 2 iterations cycling the SMG_BulletSpeeds 8-step fan); grenades (±3 GrenadeSpeeds, the GrenadeYOffsets parabola verbatim, 0x18 fuse, 1-iteration ±20 blast window); rockets (±5, contact 0x0A + wall explosion); plastic bombs (PBombDirOffset verbatim, 0x30 fuse, ChkBasementWall + the Metal Gear leg order); mines; the remote missile (±4 MissileIniSpeed, ControlMissile re-aim, Snake frozen via the shot-ID-7 gate). Shots run at the ROM iteration boundary (~30Hz) so speeds/fuses are literal. The hit pipeline (ChkPlayerShots/ChkHitEnemies/ChkEneHitByShot) is done: per-weapon shapes, per-enemy damage columns (the bosses; guards use the flat WEAPON_DMG row), the explosives contact branch (ChkEnemyHitByShot4) without double hits, and the Metal Gear 16-bomb sequence (ChkBombOrder/ChkBombOrder2 with the PlasticBombOrder bytes VERBATIM — playtest Test 7). The KillActor family is done: SFX 0x16 (decoded guard-dead.wav) at every kill site, the IdsKillLogic dispatch targets all live, ChkDropItem drops, and reinforcements (ChkRespawnEnemy via hazards-reinforcements; the NumRespawnGuards counter is approximated by the live-guard count — minor divergence). The 6-slot shot pool and per-type max-actives are done; the VDP sprite-plane reservation internals (ReserveShotSpr2/3, NumSprShot, SetPlayerShotSpr2-5) are out of scope (canvas draws shots.png), leaving ReserveShotSpr/SetPlayerShotSpr/SetShotSpr partial as the entry points. The weapon + EQUIPMENT menus (logic/menuequipment.asm) are done (changes: equipment-menus, menu-door-fidelity): the compacted owned grid, exact SelectIdx clamps, ControlHoldWait 8 repeat, moving-is-selecting (EquipRemoved → empty menus selecting 0, capture flow), and ChkUseItem fully live — ration full-heal (deep-water gated), the bugged-transmitter drop, antidote (scorpion poison), cigarettes +2000 on the countdown — with SFX 0x20/0x21 decoded. ExitEquipMenu is partial: the close works but the binoculars branch (and BinocularSprAtt) awaits the unported binoculars mode (SESSION-STATE 'Remaining polish').

components.title: Item/weapon pickups (room items, inventory, drops)
components.notes: The acquisition loop is ported (changes: item-pickups, the world slices): AddRoomItems from exported items.json (the ROM's real rooms 122-217 live across the connected world; the demo overlay rooms 3/9/10 are a documented divergence), the ChkTakeItem pickup box (32/16-wide per the WeaponGfxXY/ItemGfxXY odd-X rule), the full dispatch (PickUpWeapon + GetWeapon first-pick auto-select, PickSupressor → silent handgun, PickAmmoCrate owned-only grants, AddItemInventory/AddItemAmount with rank clamps), SetItemAsTaken respawn rules, and ChkDropItem/SpawnItem punch-kill drops (slot-faithful: 3 fixed slots, no compaction, SpawnItem2 checks only slot 0; room 150's suppressor drop included). EraseTakenItem/ErasePickedItem2/3 are done: slot release, SFX 0x24, the last-item description path — the VRAM background restore is inherent to the per-frame canvas redraw. ItemTakeText shipped verbatim (wired-prisoner-texts) INCLUDING the Western ROM's gate (only text 62 ever shows — the disassembly's own bug/limitation note, so silent pickups are the ported behaviour). RecoverEquipment/AddTransmitter are live with the capture flow. Max-ammo: MaxAmmoLv1-4 + the per-rank ration caps (3/6/9/18) are used VERBATIM via the rank clamp; SetMaxAmmo3 and the MaxAmmoVals 999 table are the INTRUDER/ISOLATION password cheats — no password system, todo. logic/shrinkitems.asm (the menu slot compaction) is tracked here: CompactWeapons/CompactEquipment are done as the once-per-open compacted snapshot, but the inner slot-movers are partial — JS rebuilds from Map insertion order, so the ROM's documented compaction BUG (a leftover gap after two consecutive drops/uses) is not reproduced. Remaining: ClearGameVars (the new-game wipe — the port's restart is a continue, a documented divergence) and DrawRoomItems (floor items use the HUD icon sheet instead of the dedicated VRAM bitmaps — documented approximation). Integer ammo instead of BCD stays a documented divergence; pickup/spawn SFX 0x24/0x25 decoded.

components.title: Rank progression (prisoners, Class up/down)
components.notes: Rank core is ported (change: rank-progression): prisoner actors (idle 2-frame animation, the ActorsShapeTouch 0x17 touch box, no damage/alarm on touch, shootable with LIFE 2), every 5 rescues -> IncClassLv (cap 3, SFX 0x26) -> UpdateLevels (MaxLife 24/32/40/48, FULL heal on rank-up, per-rank ammo clamps), and kill -> DowngradeRank (regular-17 flag reset with the 6 RoomsPrisoner specials preserved, Class-1 floor 0, SFX 0x27, clamped levels). The texts are now WIRED (changes: wire-item-prisoner-texts, ellen-pitfalls, madnar): PrisonerRescued's full dispatch — Ellen 167 -> text 129 (RescuePrisoner), Coward Duck 193 -> ChkRescJenBro (Y 0x54 -> 140, else 131), Madnar 182 -> the Ellen-gated 124/125, else the verbatim 19-pair PrisonerTexts table (RescuedLogic2/3). The HELP-ME voice is live: room 166's actor cries text 128 unskippable every 0xC0 iterations (ChkSayHelpMe). Real prisoners spawn from actors.json with their sheets (Grey Fox 164 / Ellen 167 / Madnar 182); the room-189 fake-Madnar trap is its own actor (fakemadnar.asm, madnar change). Remaining gaps: MadnarLogic's pre-Ellen no-SetAsRescued respawn exploit isn't reproduced (JS always marks him rescued and counts once); PrisonerIdle's Coward-Duck Card8 rescue gate and Ellen's OWN idle help-me call aren't wired; InitEllenVoice doesn't dismiss after Ellen's rescue and first-cries after 2 iterations vs the ROM's 0x20; KillPrisoner's room-193 JennifBrotherDead flag is missing (the radio gate it feeds is also a pass-through); rooms hold ONE prisoner (ROM rooms like 193 hold several) and DEMO prisoners persist in cluster rooms 3/5-9; Class/rescues survive the restart (ROM continue). IncClassLv_ is the password-cheat trampoline — passwords aren't ported.

components.title: Capture flow (trigger, scene, prison, recovery)
components.notes: CommonLogic trigger + the scripted scene + PutInPrison + the punched-out cell walls + RecoverEquipment with the bugged transmitter. The fade is a canvas alpha approximation of the palette fade.

components.title: Lasers + cameras (beams, goggles, camera patrol/sight, laser shots)
components.notes: Fully shipped (changes: lasers + its playtest fixes, building-2, world-complete/endgame Test-7 fixes). Beams: lasers.json (from data/laserconfig.asm), InitLaserRoom's no-beams-in-alert gate, ChkTouchLaser's exact inequalities -> RED alert + RemoveLaserBeans, DrawLaserBeams' goggles-selected + no-alert gate drawing the ROM's exact 1px line geometry (canvas fillRect replaces the VDP LINE command; the goggles infrared palette ships as .goggles.png room variants). Room 72's DrawMovingLasers five-pattern 0xC0 cycle is LIVE since building-2 (status AND collision bytes both switched). The RestLasersBack family (VRAM page-1->page-0 background restore) is out of scope — the canvas redraws every frame. Cameras: cameras.json bakes RoomsWithCamera/RoomCamTypes/CamDirs1-7 + actorsinrooms positions + idxRoomPaths patrols (GetPathPoints); CameraDrawOffsets is the CAMERA_EYE lens verbatim; sight -> CamAlertAnim's 0x20 bit-2 red flash -> RenderCamera freeze (status 2, collisions off; rendercameras.asm's DrawCamera frame math = the camera.png blit at X-8/Y-8). Laser cams: the full LaserCameraShot tail is ported, INCLUDING the checkpoint columns after LaserCameraShot9 (LaserCameraShot4/5's KO_POINTER_H momentary pause — the old 'room-115 checkpoint not ported' note was STALE; rooms 115/118/149 ship since world-complete and the Test-7 fix made the sweeps nonstop per ChkReachPoint), CameraChkContinue toward the PATH point with the exact-X hold, |dx|>=0x60 path re-init (InitCamera3), shots growing one 16px segment per iteration with ChkLaserShot's LaserLenghts-span 0x10 damage and SFX 4. Gaps: InitCameraLaser's room-118 MetalGear_KO dismissal isn't wired (cameras stay active after Metal Gear is destroyed); LaserSetSprColor's red/white alternation is a fixed red; camera point-waits use Math.random for the ROM's R-register read (documented).

components.title: Pitfalls + the help-me voice
components.notes: The full pitfall life cycle is ported (ellen-pitfalls; staging re-verified in the madnar change + playtest Test 6): a closed pit arms TOUCH_INFO bit 7 within ±40 of the centre (ChkTriggerPitfall), opens 2px/iteration to 0x40 with SFX 7 (PitfallLogic/PitfallLogic2), and standing inside the half-size box kills outright, ignoring i-frames (ChkPitfall -> DecrementLife_B with all life). The hole is the REAL GfxPitfall art — Tools/RoomViewer --export-pitfall writes the 64x64 pitfall.png — revealed as a centre-out window exactly like PitfallLogic3/RenderPitfallP0's expanding page-1 copy (the per-edge 1px VDP line copies are replaced by a whole-window blit with the same visible result; the even-coordinate snap and the 0x3F-vs-0x40 clamp are sub-pixel divergences). Dark rooms hide the hole without the flashlight while it stays lethal. The fake-Madnar trap pushes a pitfall with ROM staging: text 109 first, the pitfall + open SFX only after the text, 1px/iteration sink (Test 6 confirmed). Pitfall positions come from actors.json. InitPitfall stays partial: the room-190 pre-opened branch (Status=2, HOLE_SIZE 0x3F, the page-1 open image) is unimplemented and the export has no pitfall for room 190 — the ROM's own room-190 actor list holds only a prisoner, so where its pitfall actor comes from needs disassembly investigation. The HELP-ME voice (room 166, text 128 every 0xC0 iterations) is live in game.js but its routine (ChkSayHelpMe, logic/actors/prisoner.asm) is counted under rank-progression.

components.title: Hazards + reinforcements (gas, barrels, electric floors, guard variants)
components.notes: Mines (contact + detector reveal), gas clouds, rolling barrels, and the electric floor + power switches (ChkElectricFloor, rooms 16/40/110/116) are ported. The room-16 GUARD_SWITCH operator (GuardSwitchLogic: patrol/look/alarm/run-to-switch/power-the-floor/guard-it), the room-150 SUPPRESSOR guards (GuardSilencerLogic move-then-cross-fire + ChkChasePlayer transform + the SUPPRESSOR drop), the per-room HideGuards entry-edge culls, and the sleepy-guard Zzz are all live. Divergences (partial): PowerSwitchLogic's palette fade is a translucent pulse over the live tiles (ChkRevertFade's bright/delta math isn't ported); the switch guard's exact LOS uses the box-aware guardSeesSnake.

components.title: First bosses (Machine Gun Kid, Shotgunner)
components.notes: Machine Gun Kid (room 20: the 5-state hide/shoot machine, the Mercenary loop, the 0..4..0 downward fan) and the Shotgunner (room 57: invulnerable rolls, aimed expanding blasts, the crate-corner hold-fire zone) are fully ported (changes: machine-gun-kid, shotgunner); their shots use the guard-bullet pool. The remaining bosses are tracked by the mid-bosses, dogs-wing and finale components.

components.title: Mid-bosses (Tank, Bulldozer, Arnolds, Fire Trooper)
components.notes: All four bosses are ported by the mid-bosses change (plus the Test-5 playtest fixes): the tank's cannon-column shell + alternating machine-gun bursts (ChkMachineGun1/2 timers 0x1E/0x2D, the NumberShots 0..4 fan, SpeedY 6 shells/bullets) at the real ActorsRoom067 spot with the mines-only damage column; the bulldozer's 0x60/0x80/0xC0/0xE0 phase push halting at Y 160 (grenades-only); the complete ArnoldLogic watch/chase/walk-back/bounce-back machine including the ROM's player-position push bug (rockets-only, CARD7 on the second death); and the Fire Trooper's real 6-status routine (FT_Walk clamped to X 0x60..0x80, the FT_MoveFlames pendulum ANGLE 0x18..0x3F with sin/16-cos/16 steps and the FLAME_MOV_ID sign cycle) with the red+yellow Fire1/Fire2 flames. Boss sprite composition is the documented best-effort multi-pair layout; KO latches/boss-music handoffs follow SetBossMusic/SetBulldozerKO. Known gaps: the tank's every-128-iteration idle beat (AnimateTank status 2 / TankIdle) is missing and its up/down scheduling approximates TankMove/TankMoveLong with a vy flip; the MG fan is signed outward per gun side instead of TankShotLogic's centered SpeedXUnsigned-2; SetArnoldRndWait's range is roughly halved; past BuldozerStop3 the port keeps cycling stop/move instead of BulldozerDummy's continuous final push. The desert falling-shell barrage (all of tankshell.asm + shellspawner.asm, ID_TANK_SHELL_AIR gated on BossTank_KO) is entirely unported. TankAlive and loc_106472/loc_106499/loc_10649F are unreachable ROM dead code (out of scope / no-op). TankIdle's every-128-iteration idle beat is the one documented behavioural partial. FlamesLogic2/FlameOutScreen/SetSprColor_ are MSX sprite plumbing (hiding flames via color 0 on the 8-bit X wrap) — out of scope; FT_BringInFlames' retraction maps to shrinking the flames array instead.

components.title: Dogs wing (dogs, shooters, Coward Duck)
components.notes: Room-207 surface dogs (DogLogic: sleep/listen/charge) and the Coward Duck (CowardDuckLogic + the elliptical boomerang + the CARD8 drop) are verbatim. The basement dogs (dogbasement.asm, rooms 6/10/55/56/58-63, basementDogMove) free-roam: sleep -> run (roam, turning at walls via the 8px probe) -> chase (re-aim on the current axis with a bark, ChkDogNearPlayer); a placed dog starts asleep, a spawned dog (ID_SPAWN_DOG) running. The ambush shooters (shooter.asm, rooms 88/90/91/206, shooterLogic) strafe sideways, fire VERTICAL bullets, return to the start X, and transform into an alert chaser after 3 cycles or when the player closes in vertically — rooms 88/90/91 set the alarm directly (timer 0x80, budget 0x0A), room 206 doesn't. Divergences (partial): the shooter's player-entry Y-relocation is simplified to the exported positions, and the dog spawner's cross-room NumBasementDogs carry-over is approximated by placed dogs.

components.title: Desert (scorpions, desert security)
components.notes: Scorpions shipped complete with the desert-scorpions change and survived playtest Test 1: the three-state machine (wander/attack/wait) runs on the ROM's literal values — the 0x51 detection distance, RandomWait5_8 bursts, the ±1 diagonal ScorpionSpeedDat table, ChkScorpionLimits' exact wrap margins, the 0x14 rest, and SetScorpionSprId's call-site-only frame updates. Playtest fixes made the charge CalcShot's constant-magnitude quantized dash at the default ShotSpeed 0x80 and re-exported the sprites in the real SprsetPal4 reds; the sting's poison path (ChkScorpion/the drain/the antidote) is counted under player-damage-hud. desertsecurity.asm is entirely unported: lock 12's consuming gate exists (ChkDesertDoorBuild2) but doorBuild2Open is never set true, so the uniform check (DesertSecurity1/2), the alarm-on-no-uniform, the FOXHOUNDER warning text (ChkDesertGuardTxt), and the Come-in door-opening sequence (DesertSecurity3/4) do not exist — building 2's desert entrance cannot be opened by the guards, and the enemy uniform has no effect there.

components.title: Roof (bridges, chasm falls, parachute, air flow, jetpack, sentinels)
components.notes: Shipped by the roof-traversal change (playtest Test 2 confirmed). The bridges are fully ported: eight segments at BridgesSpeeds 0x40..0x100 reversing every 0x20 iterations off one controller (BridgeCtrlLogic), the flag-only shape-7 touch box (the ROM never carries Snake), and ChkOnBridge's GetTilePlayer two-column chasm probe feeding the fall chain — documented divergences: the <=8 seam closure on the touch band and the 0x10 first-flip centering. The jetpack event chain is ported end-to-end (JetpackSwitchLogic descend to Y 0x86 + alarm 0x5A, the click + power switch at 0x44/0x70, JetpacTakeoff 0x20 rise, JetPackAlert 0x1E, JetPackMove's exact 0x18/0x30 accelerations, the random 0x1E+ shot cadence), but the directional sprite routines are not driven (the real SprJetGuard sheet always draws the down facing, SetJetpackFloorSpr unused), the PreviousRoom-160 dismissal is absent, InitJetpack's standalone flying spawn only exists via the takeoff transform, and the port adds touch damage the ROM's COLLISION_CFG 2 forbids (undocumented divergence). Sentinels live inside the guard system with exported direction-byte lists (InitSentinel4/GetSentinelLookDirs) and TransformAlertGuard via the shared alert AI; SENTINEL_WAIT is the documented fixed-0x40 approximation of the ROM's per-cycle random R. InitSentinel's room specials are unported: the room-140 sleepy config (InitSentinel2), HideGuardRoom39, and the room-69 DESERT_GUARD flag with SentinelLogic's LOS skip (tied to the unported desert security).

components.title: Lorry ride + lorry guards
components.notes: The moving-lorry RIDE (GameMode 5) is a verbatim port (MovingLorries arms it for 0x90 iterations, the VertScrollOffset wobble, the once-per-game text 91, LorryEnd). The lorry GUARDS (guardlorry.asm, rooms 5/7, lorryGuardLogic) run the full emerge/patrol/return cycle — hidden in the lorry, walk down out (setting Guard1/2/3ExitedLorry), patrol the path once, walk back up in (clearing the flag), re-arm; while out, the alarm transforms them into chasers. The room-104 lorry SHOOTERS (lorryshooter.asm, lorryShooterLogic) are the faithful HIDDEN pop-out ambush — think -> shoot-from-inside / show+shoot / walk-out+shoot+walk-in, aimed ID_BULLET — with the alert MUSIC (no AlertMode) on entry; hidden lorry actors are non-drawn and non-collidable. The exit flags are saved and drive the InitGuardAlert dedup (rooms 127/131/132). Divergences: the engine SFX loops the whole ride; SetVertScroll is the canvas shake (out of scope).

components.title: Hind D, Big Boss, Metal Gear + self-destruct
components.notes: The hind-d gunship (room 50) and the TX-55 Metal Gear (room 118: the bomb-order destruction arming the self-destruct, DoorOpenArray doors 99/107, the Beyond-Big-Boss music takeover) are faithful, and the destruction now shows ShowEmergencyText's text 150 (unskippable) + arms the room-111 SwitchOffMSXF (ChkSwitchMsxOff). Big Boss (bigBossTick) is the six-state corridor/crate AI (Think/Run/ShowUp/Shoot/Cover, bbCovered crate spots, bbTurnCorner 24/200/56/168 corners) firing the straight axis bullet (BB_Shoot, fireAxisBullet) with the real SprBigBoss sprite; the confession (text 147) + death latch are faithful. The endgame countdown (destructiontimer.asm: DecNukeTimer, the zero-kill, ChkUseCigarettes +2000) is done. Divergences (partial): DestroyMetalG's 0x22-iteration palette-FLASH is skipped (the wreck + emergency text are instant); the room-133/113 "Madnar moved / too late" story events (ChkMadnarMsx/chkMadnarLate) and bigexplosion.asm's tank-shell burst actor are unported.

components.title: Radio/transceiver, incoming calls + text windows
components.notes: The transceiver (RadioLogic GameMode 4) is ported: the DrawRadio UI, the red 120.xx BCD frequency with ChgRadioFreq hold-repeat, UP=SEND (text 10 + talking portrait), the 12-LED RadioSignalUp, ChkRadioReceiv auto-reply/wait-call from radiocalls.json with the AutoReplyDone/ReplyRequested latches, and RadioSignalOFF; opening the radio stops the incoming CALL (ChkIncomingCall lifecycle + the CALL-sign blink). The SEND reply GATES are ported (ChkRadioReply -> radioReplyGate): Big Boss (0x85/0x13) orders "switch off your MSX" [text 136] after room 111 (switchOffMsx via ChkSwitchMsxOff) and warns "you have been bugged" [text 50] when transmiTaken; a CAPTURED Schneider (0x79/0x26) is silent; Jennifer (0x48) needs rank class >= 3. The text window (TextBoxAppear/TW_PrintChar/SkipText/SetTextUnskippable) is done. Divergences (partial/inert): the MapZone>=5 ANTENNA gate, Jennifer's dead-brother gate, and the Madnar/text-15 gate need unmodelled progression; DrawTextBoxIn's exact box-grow + per-page TW_Wait pacing are approximated.

components.title: Title/boot sequence + attract demo
components.notes: The title-boot change (archived) ported the full boot state machine: GS_KonamiLogo's white-screen line reveal (49 lines at one per two ROM iterations, then the 0x20 hold), and MenuLogoLogic's five idxIntro states — LogoSfx (SFX 0x47, MenuCnt 0x0C), LogoScroll/DrawMG_Logo stepping the METAL/GEAR blocks down MGLogoYpos with the ROM's no-erase smear trail on an accumulating surface, EraseLogoRests parking the logo, PrintPushSpace/txtPushSpace, and DrawMenuNow via titleSkip. ChkAnykeyStart is faithful: any key before the menu jumps to the parked title via GoToMenu (SFX 0x4A), Fire 1/2 on the menu starts GS_PlayStart's blinking PLAY START (0x50 iterations, bit-2 draw/erase) into GS_StartGame's black beat. The logo data tables (KonamiLogoPal, KonamiLogoTiles, MGLogoColors, MenuPalette, MetalTilesDat, GearTilesDat) are consumed by the RoomViewer exporter into konami-logo.png/metal.png/gear.png, which also bakes SetMetalGearLogo's DrawTiles layout. The attract demo (all of gamedemo.asm — the GS_DemoPlay input replays and the tutorial screens) is NOT ported, a documented divergence: the title idles on PUSH SPACE KEY forever, so GS_WaitMenu's countdown into the demo is also todo.

components.title: Font / symbol / CALL-sign glyph loading (via asset export)
components.notes: LoadFont's four loads all have consumed equivalents: the 108-glyph gfxFont+gfxSymbChars run exported as font.png/font.json (including the yellow CLASS star appended at starX) and drawn by drawText/drawStar; gfxFreqDigits (red) exported as freq-digits.png and used by the radio frequency + self-destruct timer digits; gfxCALL decoded through the colorsCALL palette into call-sign.png. ClearP1_24x8 is a pure VRAM page-1 rectangle clear with no behavioural content — out of scope.

components.title: Ending, checkpoints, save/load + passwords
components.notes: The full checkpoint/continue flow is ported: ChkSaveGameStatus scans the 31-pair SaveStatRooms table on every (Room, PreviousRoom) transition (chkSaveGameStatus, armed from setRoom; ChkSaveGameStatus2/3) and skips while MetalGear_KO (mgDestroyed); StoreGameStat snapshots the whole GameDataAreas block (serializeProgress via takePendingCheckpoint; SaveGameStaus2-5) and RestoreGameStat rolls EVERYTHING — room, position, ammo, doors, equipment, rank — back to that snapshot on death (restart -> restoreProgress, clearing DamageDelayTimer/Poisoned), so progress made since the checkpoint is lost as in the ROM. Documented divergence: the snapshot is a JS object rather than the GameProgressBuffer byte block (same effect); a pre-checkpoint death (intro bypassed via ?room) falls back to the intro landing keeping live inventory. Verified by web/checkpoints.headless.mjs. The endgame change shipped the in-game escape ladders + self-destruct countdown, but the ending cinematics are entirely todo: every ending.asm state — EndingEscaping's run-away with the live countdown, the explosions, the radio news auto-tune to 120.77, the staff roll, the fade, Big Boss's threat — is stood in for by the minimal drawEscapeBanner; GS_Ending is on the Remaining-polish list. Cassette save/load (saveload.asm) and the password system (passwords.asm) are wholly unported real features, all todo — none are marked out-of-scope: every saveload routine wraps game flow (filename UI, verify/retry prompts, checksums) around the TAPION/TAPIN/TAPOUT BIOS calls, so a future port would keep the flow and diverge only at the storage backend.

tooling.title: Asset export (sprites / rooms / doors / alert icon / guard bullet)
tooling.notes: RLE/sprite-attribute decoding + colour-combine compositing rebuilt offline to emit web/assets PNGs + atlases. Tracked qualitatively, not by routine count.

tooling.title: Audio export (SFX + music to WAV)
tooling.notes: PSG emulation + the music/SFX driver rebuilt offline to render punch/door/alert/dead WAVs. The driver internals are out-of-scope for the gameplay denominator; tracked qualitatively here.
